description: The Flavian dynasty left behind a rich legacy, including the building of one of the wonders of the world: The Colosseum.
tooltip:
[font="sans-bold-14"]The Flavian dynasty left behind a rich legacy.
• Wonders and Amphitheaters +50% health.
• Wonders and Amphitheaters −50% build time.
• Wonders and Amphitheaters +50% capture resistance.[/font]
